original_abstract: This paper provides an overview of ChatGPT, a natural language processing (NLP) system developed by Open AI. It discusses the features of ChatGPT, its benefits, and its challenges. The paper also provides an analysis of the potential applications of ChatGPT and its limitations. The paper concludes that ChatGPT is a powerful NLP system that can generate human-like conversations, but it has some challenges that must be addressed.
humanized_abstract: This paper explores ChatGPT, a natural language processing (NLP) system that was released by Open AI in December 2022. The paper highlights the different features of ChatGPT, its advantages and its weaknesses. The paper also examines the applications of ChatGPT and its limitations. The paper finally concluded that ChatGPT is a very strong tool for NLP that can carry on conversations in a human manner, but it has some weaknesses that must be addressed.
